title: cerastium illyricum subsp. prolixum
intro: Cerastium illyricum subsp. prolixum, also known as the Dalmatian cockscomb, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cerastium illyricum subsp. prolixum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections, making it a useful herb for treating skin conditions and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or oil to create a soothing and antibacterial tea or salve.
